planned_lemmas.name: strict local activation lemma
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: Under SWC-VF-H2-003, SWC-VF-H2-004, and SWC-VF-H2-005, the witness coordinate has strict memory-ledger advantage.

planned_lemmas.name: structural witness lemma
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: The primitive witness conditions imply the strict witness condition used by the earlier conditional theorem.

planned_lemmas.name: positive aggregate witness lemma
planned_lemmas.planned_claim: A strict witness coordinate with positive aggregation weight implies ledger_effect_size > 0 under nonnegative weights.

planned_theorem.name: resolved structural witness strict positivity theorem
planned_theorem.planned_statement: In the finite coordinatewise toy domain, if decomposed monotonicity holds and SWC-VF-H2-001 through SWC-VF-H2-006 hold, then ledger_effect_size > 0.

primitive_witness_conditions.name: finite coordinatewise toy domain
primitive_witness_conditions.statement: The toy state space is [0,1]^V over finite V, ordered coordinatewise.

primitive_witness_conditions.name: matched null coupling
primitive_witness_conditions.statement: The memory-ledger and null processes share initial state, finite horizon, graph, and symbolic inputs.

primitive_witness_conditions.name: positive ledger readout advantage
primitive_witness_conditions.statement: At a reachable witness pair, the persistent ledger readout is strictly greater than the null ledger readout.

primitive_witness_conditions.name: strict activation margin
primitive_witness_conditions.statement: At the witness pair, the activation map is strictly increasing over the ledger-readout interval induced by SWC-VF-H2-003.

primitive_witness_conditions.name: non-saturation
primitive_witness_conditions.statement: The witness coordinate is not already saturated in a way that erases the strict activation difference.

primitive_witness_conditions.name: positive witness aggregation weight
primitive_witness_conditions.role: turns local strict difference into positive ledger_effect_size
primitive_witness_conditions.statement: The witness node-time pair has strictly positive aggregation weight.

resolution_targets.name: strict activation margin
resolution_targets.planned_resolution: Introduce an explicit primitive margin condition: at witness pair (v*,t*), the activation map is strictly increasing with respect to the ledger readout over the relevant interval.
resolution_targets.problem: The structural witness theorem cannot be proved unless strict ledger contribution creates a strict next-state difference rather than a merely weak nondecrease.
resolution_targets.success_criterion: A strict local ledger readout advantage implies x_L(t*+1,v*) > x_0(t*+1,v*) without assuming the witness conclusion directly.

resolution_targets.name: coordinatewise order restriction
resolution_targets.planned_resolution: Restrict the structural witness theorem to finite real-valued toy states with coordinatewise order and nonnegative aggregation weights.
resolution_targets.problem: The generalized ordered-domain claim is too broad for the next proof attempt.
resolution_targets.success_criterion: The proof no longer depends on an unspecified abstract partial order.
